# Demex Docs

## Demex

- [About Demex](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/about-demex.md)
- [Roadmap](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/about-demex/roadmap.md): Check out what's coming soon. Last Updated on 5 May 2025.
- [Terms and Conditions](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/about-demex/terms-and-conditions.md): Last updated: 29 November 2023
- [Disclaimers](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/about-demex/disclaimers.md)
- [Getting Started](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started.md)
- [Connect Wallet](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started/connect-wallet.md): No registration required.
- [MetaMask](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started/connect-wallet/metamask.md): This guide explains how to use MetaMask on Desktop and Mobile to connect to Demex.
- [MetaMask Migration](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started/connect-wallet/metamask/metamask-migration.md)
- [WalletConnect](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started/connect-wallet/walletconnect.md)
- [Social Media Login](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started/connect-wallet/social-media-login.md)
- [Ledger](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started/connect-wallet/ledger.md): This guide explains how to use Ledger on Desktop to connect to Demex.
- [Leap](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started/connect-wallet/leap.md)
- [Keplr](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started/connect-wallet/keplr.md): This guide explains how to use Keplr on Desktop to connect to Demex.
- [Encrypted Key](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started/connect-wallet/encrypted-key.md): This guide explains how to use Encrypted Key to connect to Demex.
- [Depositing](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started/depositing.md)
- [Activate Account](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started/activate-account.md): An explanation of the activate account dialogue
- [One-Click Trading](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/getting-started/one-click-trading.md): Enable one-click trading for the best trading experience on Demex, on par with CEXs.
- [Deposits & Withdrawals](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/deposits-and-withdrawals.md)
- [Withdrawing](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/deposits-and-withdrawals/withdrawing.md): Really..?
- [Internal Transfers](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/deposits-and-withdrawals/internal-transfers.md): Cheap transfers between Demex users
- [Address Management](https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/deposits-and-withdrawals/address-management.md)
- [Demex Points](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/demex-points.md)
- [Spins](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/demex-points/spins.md)
- [Wheel of Fortune and Loot Boxes](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/demex-points/wheel-of-fortune-and-loot-boxes.md)
- [Squads](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/demex-points/squads.md): Create your own squad or be part of a squad to earn extra Demex Points!
- [Retroactive Demex Points](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/demex-points/retroactive-demex-points.md)
- [DMX Token](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/demex-points/dmx-token.md)
- [FAQs](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/demex-points/faqs.md)
- [Demex Endgame: 50,000,000 Demex Points](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/demex-endgame-50-000-000-demex-points.md): From 7 - 30 April 2025, compete in Demex Endgame and climb the leaderboard to win your share of 50,000,000 Demex Points!
- [Demex Credits](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/demex-credits.md): Welcome to Demex Credits, where you earn your trading fees in rewards!
- [User Pools](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/user-pools.md): Trade with More Collateral, Earn Shared Profits through User Pools.

- [#PerpsOnDemex](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/past-events/2025/perpsondemex.md): From 20 Feb - 31 March, trade perpetuals on Demex and compete for the highest cumulative PnL on a single position to win a share of $500 USD.
- [Demex Referral Club](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/past-events/2025/demex-referral-club.md): From 1 - 30 September 2025, invite your friends to trade on Demex and earn $5 for each referral that completes $1,000 in perpetual trading volume.
- [Traḋemex Bot](https://guide.dem.exchange/demex-rewards/past-events/2025/trademex-bot.md): Trade on Demex directly from Telegram.

---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://guide.dem.exchange/welcome/about-demex.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
